name: Shooter
short_description: This is a very popular sniper game with great gameplay. Feel the thrill of shooting at the touch, come and experience it as soon as possible!
detailed_description:
This is a very popular sniper game with great gameplay. Feel the thrill of shooting at the touch, come and experience it as soon as possible!

Game features:

Restore real sniping, with wind speed and distance effects when aiming at the target

Easy to operate, easy to understand game graphics

-Ultra realistic battlefield simulation

-Exciting Action Games

-Simple game graphics

-Unique burst system
